title: cleome arabica subsp. amblyocarpa
intro: Cleome arabica subsp. amblyocarpa, also known as the "bee flower", is a plant species that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cleome arabica subsp. amblyocarpa include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
